About.title: TecPey — a secure and modern way to enter the digital asset economy
About.description: TecPey focuses on live crypto prices, security, transparency and a responsive user experience built for Persian-speaking users.
About.OurStory-desc: TecPey was created to give users a clearer, safer and more professional starting point for crypto trading.
About.vision-desc: To become a trusted Persian fintech brand for secure access to the digital economy.
About.mission-desc: To reduce complexity, improve transparency and help users start crypto trading with confidence.
About.advantage-desc: TecPey combines mobile-first UX, live markets, educational content and trust-building design.
About.security-desc: TecPey prioritizes the security of our users' funds and data. We implement multi-layer security measures, including cold storage, two-factor authentication, and regular security audits to ensure the safety of our users' assets.
About.ecosystem-desc: TecPey offers a wide range of trading options, including spot trading, futures trading, staking, and investment boxes. Our platform is designed to meet the needs of both beginners and experienced traders, providing a seamless trading experience.
About.mce-desc: TecPey (TecPey Community Ecosystem) is designed to foster a vibrant community of users, developers, and partners who are committed to the growth and success of the TecPey platform.
About.principle1: Respect the Market — Act with Insight and Responsibility
About.principle2: Own the Outcome — Base Decisions on Data, Not Guesswork
About.principle3: Face Challenges with Agility and Courage
About.future-desc: If you're ready to help build a future powered by trust, innovation, and collaboration, TecPey is the place for you.

Social.support-description: Questions about registration, markets or trading? TecPey helps reduce user confusion.

Rules.title: Trading Rules
Rules.subtitle: Understand the rules and guidelines that govern trading on TecPey to ensure a safe and compliant trading experience.
Rules.rule1-desc: Keep your account secure by using strong passwords, enabling two-factor authentication, and never sharing your login credentials with anyone.
Rules.rule2-desc: Engage in fair and ethical trading practices. Avoid market manipulation, insider trading, and any activities that could harm the integrity of the market.
Rules.rule3-desc: Adhere to all applicable laws and regulations in your jurisdiction when trading on TecPey. This includes tax obligations and reporting requirements.
Rules.rule4-desc: Do not engage in any prohibited activities such as money laundering, fraud, or any other illegal activities.
Rules.rule5-desc: Be aware of the trading hours for different markets and plan your trading activities accordingly. TecPey operates 24/7, but certain markets may have specific trading hours.
Rules.rule6-desc: Understand the risks associated with trading cryptocurrencies and use risk management strategies to protect your investments.

NotFound.title: Page Not Found
NotFound.description: The page you are looking for may have been removed, had its name changed, or is temporarily unavailable. You can return to the home page or check the URL.

Fees.title: Fees
Fees.desc: Transparent and clear fee structure to help users trade with confidence on TecPey.
Fees.tradeDesc: Our spot trading fees are designed to be competitive and transparent. We offer a tiered fee structure based on your 30-day trading volume, with discounts for high-volume traders.
Fees.feesDesc:
Trading Fees on TecPey Trading fees on the TecPey platform are
calculated as a percentage of the total transaction amount and are
applied based on the rules described below. These fees help
prevent artificial or repetitive trading activity and ensure a
fair and efficient market environment for all users. TecPey
charges a percentage‑based fee on both sides of every trade,
regardless of whether you are buying or selling. How Fees Are
Calculated Fees are calculated as a percentage of the asset you
receive in the transaction. For example: If you are selling
Bitcoin and receiving IRT, the fee is calculated from the IRT
amount. If you are buying Bitcoin using IRT, the fee is calculated
from the Bitcoin amount. When placing an order on TecPey, the
exact fee amount for that trade will be displayed before you
confirm your transaction.
Fees.cryptoDesc: TecPey offers a wide range of cryptocurrencies for deposit and withdrawal. The fees for these transactions vary based on the specific cryptocurrency and the network used. We strive to keep our fees competitive while ensuring the security and reliability of our services.
Fees.irtDesc: TecPey provides convenient options for depositing and withdrawing IRT. The fees for these transactions are designed to be transparent and competitive, allowing you to manage your funds with confidence. Please refer to our fee schedule for the most up-to-date information on IRT deposit and withdrawal fees.

BTC.name: Bitcoin
BTC.title: About Bitcoin
BTC.desc: Bitcoin (BTC) is the first decentralized cryptocurrency, created in 2009 by an anonymous person or group known as Satoshi Nakamoto. It introduced blockchain technology — a distributed ledger that records transactions securely and transparently without the need for a central authority. Bitcoin is widely considered the most established digital asset and is often referred to as digital gold due to its limited supply of 21 million coins. The price of Bitcoin is determined by supply and demand in global cryptocurrency markets and is influenced by factors such as institutional adoption, macroeconomic trends, regulation, and investor sentiment.

ETH.name: Ethereum
ETH.title: About Ethereum
ETH.desc: Ethereum (ETH) is a decentralized blockchain platform launched in 2015 by Vitalik Buterin and other developers. Unlike Bitcoin, Ethereum was designed to support smart contracts — self‑executing programs that run on the blockchain. This capability allows developers to build decentralized applications (dApps), decentralized finance (DeFi) protocols, and NFTs. Ethereum operates using its native cryptocurrency, Ether (ETH), which is used to pay for transaction fees and computational services on the network.

BNB.name: BNB
BNB.title: About BNB
BNB.desc: BNB is the native cryptocurrency of the BNB Chain ecosystem, originally launched by the Binance exchange in 2019. It was initially created as a utility token to reduce trading fees on the Binance platform but has since evolved into a major asset powering a broad ecosystem including decentralized finance applications, NFT marketplaces, and blockchain games. BNB is used for transaction fees, staking, and governance within the BNB Chain network.

SOL.name: Solana
SOL.title: About Solana
SOL.desc: Solana (SOL) is a high‑performance blockchain designed to support scalable decentralized applications and crypto projects. Launched in 2020, Solana focuses on extremely fast transaction speeds and low fees. It uses a unique consensus mechanism called Proof of History combined with Proof of Stake, enabling the network to process thousands of transactions per second. Solana has become popular for DeFi platforms, NFT marketplaces, and Web3 applications.

XRP.name: XRP
XRP.title: About XRP
XRP.desc: XRP is the native digital asset of the XRP Ledger, a blockchain designed for fast and efficient cross‑border payments. Developed by Ripple Labs, XRP aims to improve international money transfers by enabling near‑instant settlement with very low transaction costs. Financial institutions and payment providers often explore the XRP Ledger as an alternative infrastructure for global payment systems.

ADA.name: Cardano
ADA.title: About Cardano
ADA.desc: Cardano (ADA) is a third‑generation blockchain platform focused on scalability, sustainability, and academic research‑driven development. Founded by Charles Hoskinson, one of Ethereum’s co‑founders, Cardano uses a Proof of Stake consensus mechanism called Ouroboros. The platform supports smart contracts and decentralized applications while emphasizing security, formal verification, and long‑term network sustainability.

DOGE.name: Dogecoin
DOGE.title: About Dogecoin
DOGE.desc: Dogecoin (DOGE) is a cryptocurrency that started as a light‑hearted project in 2013 but has grown into a widely recognized digital asset with a strong community. Inspired by the Doge internet meme featuring a Shiba Inu dog, Dogecoin was originally created as a fun alternative to Bitcoin. It is known for fast transaction times, low fees, and a community‑driven ecosystem. Although it began as a meme coin, Dogecoin has become one of the most traded cryptocurrencies in the market.
